Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Hundre.title: Hundred Hills Mine
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Hundre.content:
The mine established in The Hundred Hills. The entrance was the anus of The Wrath’s remains. also accessible from within the mine is the Azer Holy Forge.
originally chanced upon by the people that founded Ramsted, it has functioned in largely the same way for hundreds of years
Aside from all normal metals, the mine contains Mithril, Adamantium, and Orichalcum. It also includes Rhodium, who’s special properties make it highly desirable for use in constructs.
Home to the Minor Miners and their leader Erwin Earthsplitter

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Naymor.title: Naymor's Sepulcher
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Naymor.content: The lair the detestable protolich Necrolord Nyctasha. It is the final resting place of the body of Naymor, and was sealed off from the world by an ancient party of heroes. now it is home to a whole host of malcontent undead.

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.title: Ramsted GCS Parish
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.content:
The Physical church for the religion of the Grand Church of Science in the Ramsted area

Lore
Description
A 3 story tall structure, it is the highest and most imposing building in all of Ramsted. Its walls are completely black and two spires jut out from each of its corners and spiral into the sky. There is a gap in the middle of the structure which is the courtyard of the church, which holds a giant tree that appears long dead judging from its withered appearance. the back half of the church after the courtyard rises only 2 stories high compared to the three stories of the front part, the two areas connected by long skinny hallways that also serve as the courtyards outside facing walls.
The front doors are made of heavy reinforced wood some 20 ft high and require two well muscled guards to be able to pull them just enough apart to admit one regular sized person.

Other
The courtyard of the church holds a statue of the prophet xarrod, under which there is a passageway into an underground bunker which houses the Body of Science. There is an elephants foot of radiation material as well as an actual nuclear weapon core

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.title: Ramsted Marketplace
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.content:
The central marketplace for all of Ramsted. While it was once bustling and busy, the onset of the death disease has caused traffic to decrease significantly.
the stalls at the market place include a general array of vendors that can provide most standard adventuring and survival gear. while selection may not be great, the products are reliable. There are still a few stalls that are more
Stalls
A potion stall, run by Po’Shawn the Potionseller
A smithing shop run by Hermma Scrubb

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.title: Ramsted Ranch
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.content:
organization
A quiet unassuming ranch at the border of the Ramsted city limits. But behind the innocent exterior hides a den of depravity and a silent political machine

Lore
Description
A large long Ranch house near the north side of Ramsted. Notably, this is the same side of the city that houses the Government District as well as the Church Building. The building is surrounded by farmlands, all of which are owned by the ranch itself. There is a specific path from the northern city gate to the ranch. This path is a bit more well packed than the supposed main path from which it branches. a lone skinny path goes deeper into the heart of the Ranch, with a wrought iron fence overgrown with hedges shrouding the inside of the compound from the outside.
While the Ranch is ostensibly a place to relax with a nudge and a wink towards more hedonistic pass times, most people are unaware of what truly transpires there
Other
The ranch is a bit of a front. hiding behind the gambling and the carnal indulgence is a cabal of powerful figures that control the happenings of the city. They gather dirt or other leverage against leaders of the other factions which allows them to push their own agendas. The agenda includes gaining even more power and influence as well as abusing kids. While some of the kids are orphans from the city that have no where to go or taken from the The Orme House of Healing after the parents unfortunate medical incidents, several others are stolen or taken away as leverage or just to satisfy the sick twisted leaders of the ranch. They also run Infernal Backdoors which is why they have many dealings with avernus dwellers
The leaders of the ranch are D Piddy, K Relly, and Spevin Kacey. They answer to someone far above them who controls these hubs of trafficking and horrors, the shadowy and dangerous Effery Jepstein.
They use Zida Games and Co machines for the front of house patrons
Characters
Transclude of Characters.base#ranch-characters

Conflicts/Quests
Ranch is running Infernal Backdoors secretly.

Mammon would want the infernal back doors through HIS realm destroyed so he doesnt get cut out of the taxes
he wouldn’t care about the others and possibly even encourage leaving them open to hurt the other rulers of hell.

The leaders of the ranch want to get ahold of Deacon Clein

want to find out where the lustcubus came and how to get some
give some discreet warning about Immasi’s uprising as they dont REALLY want Immasi destroying everything.

They want to find out who the party is and get some control over them
D Piddy has a Patron’s Shards that he wears around his neck

He would be willing to yield it to Thaw’aa in exchange for something of equal value.

They have Rosenbaum Lent and Venka Arton from the City Government and are mildly interested in getting Madam Clorvus under their control but since the government lacks any power they dont really care to bargain.
Now that the party has revealed themselves to him, he will try to use the party as leverage to get the other factions to do what he wants them to do. this will involve lots of double crossings with the end intended result being further enrichment and more resources secured for the larger company.

Locations
Main Area
The inside of the ranch assaults all 5 sense, almost as if to make up for the dim austere facade outside. Brilliant lights of various colors suspended in tiny floating globes dazzle the eyes as they wink with flitting intensity. Thick plush carpets cover the floor, the intricate patterns made even more so by the dancing, kaleidoscopic lights. Jaunty music wafts through the air from a set of enchanted instruments that play away in a corner. The air is thick with the smell of perfumes mixed with smokes of various kinds which dampen and dim the view of the ornate ceiling. The center of the area is dominated by an ornate wooden cage open on all 4 sides. Game tables made of the same variety of wood flank the cage on either side till the edge of the large room.
a few yards behind the Cage, the ‘rear’ of the room can be found to actually be a carved wooden divider wall with heavy saloon-style doors spaced sparingly along it. Each of these doors doesn’t appear to be guarded by much more than young boys wearing butler/maid uniforms, but getting close to the doors instills a strong sense of unease, warding away any unauthorized individuals that may come too close.
The main area has opportunities for the party to gamble and perhaps pick up on some gossip. There will be no super high profile person here but maybe some higher ranking people from various factions. The cage cashier will be Gamjiv
High Rollers Area
Beyond the wooden divider lies the high rollers area. A marked shift from the more public facing side in ambiance, this area has much more subdued lighting and colors. Not drab by any means, it moves away from the riotously bright and lively scheme to a more subtle, mature look. the carpet is a solid dark maroon, complemented by the rich deep browns of the divider wall and the open top ‘rooms’ that are found here. Unlike the open design of the main area, the high rollers area has several sequestered zones that act as rooms with walls that dont reach the ceiling around at least 3 of their sides. These more private areas are positioned so no one area can look directly into another. it would be a complete labyrinth were it not for the signs hanging from the ceiling with a number for each room. the area is split down the center and across the front in a sort of T shaped path which reveals an imposing looking large door on the back wall of the area. There are two more doors on either side of it that look more similar in design to the wooden walls of the high roller rooms.
this place will have more important people and will allow for gambling 500+ gold on things.
The Back
The area which separates the casino portion of the ranch with the other places within it. The large metal doors open to show tile and stone rather than the carpet and wood of the previous areas. there are two corridors on either side, and a double set of stairs heading down past a desk area to places further beneath the building.
The Showers
The light grey/white, shallowly pockmarked stone that makes up the walls and ceiling of the back area echoes with the sounds of water. The reflections of light on the water cast peculiar shadows and combined with the stone, give the feel of a shallow grotto or cave. the corridor continues on longer than seems possible given the estimate of how large the building is from the outside. Eventually, the corridor comes a turn, the path forward blocked off by frosted glass doors set in silvery metal. Torches give off muted light from behind similarly appointed sconces.
The Sauna
A large room, around 25ft high. the walls are made of a blackend brick. the entrance to the area is blocked off by a door made of infernal magics. the door then displays a different set of markings. 3 empty dots at the top, with 9 sigils in a circle with a center. The following is written in infernal underneath the symbols “Hell is order, Order is law, law is deception. choose the path as it descends or be consumed”  following this, the two glowing red wrought iron covers on the door will bulge outward with a glow and melt away in the air, the edges curling inward before disappearing like a paper set to flame. ends with “what is the truest essence of Hell?” depending on who you serve you can only select the sigil of that layer/archdevil.
The room is awash with a fiery glow and an oppressive heat emanating from 5 rips in reality floating in the air, in a sort of pentagon. black iron walkwaysgo from the ground up to each one. the room is split into two, the back half holding these portals, the wafting heat warping the images of the hells beyond. the front half of the room holds a singular ticket booth and an array of black iron fence that winds in an orderly fashion, like the security line at an airport.
The Offices
A suite of 3 extremely plush domiciles, the Offices of D Piddy, K Relly and Spevin Kacey are nothing short of kingly.

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.title: Ramsted Sewers
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.content:
Ever expanded and unmonitored these septic cisterns criss-cross under everything in the city, allowing for discrete meeting places and hidden lairs provided you can withstand the stench - and the occasional monster that goes squelch in the night…

The sewers are currently home to the Wyrdkin, as well as The Den, which is the hiding place of Madam Clorvus.
The Basogre’s Lair is also found here.
Due to the nature of their purpose, sewer entrances are found all over the city.

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.title: Ramsted
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/Ramste.content:
The core city and area the campaign takes place in

Ramsted is a city in the land of Setax. It is in the western part of the continent, amongst lands generally considers to backwaters and not of much note. Ramsted is in a position of some logistical import as it is built relatively close to the ocean, just a two days walk from The Ramsted Coast. it is hedged in near the south by The Hundred Hills, ringed by woodlands such as The Twin Wood and crowned by the Undocumented Poisonous Mire Area to the north.

Recently, the landscape was altered by a powerful blast that charred the area, making an already barren patch of land even more so. Scouting parties reported back not much of note, saying that the Charred Blast Zone did not contain any space metals or other minerals.


Core Issue
Ramsted and its surrounding areas have been afflicted by an all encompassing and terrifyingly deadly Death Disease. The illustrious and ever loved Delmar Danth set out to find a cure to this disease, gathering a band of his finest friends and contacts to form The Party to aide him in this matter.

Institutions and Organizations
Grand Church of Science
Ramsted is home to quite a few organizations. Chief amongst these in terms of outwards power would be The Grand Church of Science. It has slowly taken over the city and its citizens, becoming the defacto leadership of the city.
Conclave of Lliira
In direct conflict with and the strongest opposition to the GCS is the Conclave of Lliira. Another religious group, their followers sometimes clash with the scientists in the city, although this has been happening less frequently as of late.
City Government
The City Government lost the support of the people a while ago, due to several problems. What is left of their fractured leadership continues on much subdued, their goals (and commonly, continued existence) are unknown to most in the city.
The Wyrdkin
The Ramsted Sewers are cavernous, vast, and house all sorts of things including a group at odds with seemingly everyone on the surface. Known as The Wyrdkin, this group of shapeshifting people/creatures has suffered under the rule of Humans for centuries.
Ramsted Ranch
Most publicly reclusive of all would be the Ramsted Ranch. Known as simply “The Ranch”, most people generally try to avoid it as the rumors swirling about of its purpose and happenings are…less desirable to be attached to one’s person.

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/The-De.title: The Den
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/The-De.content:
The secret sewer hiding place of the remnants of the City Government

Lore
Description
Hidden in the maze-like network of twisting paths and illusory distractions that make up the Ramsted Sewers, the Den is a safehouse-turned command outpost for the leaders and staunchest supporters of the city government.
The rank, slimy, moldering paths that make up the sewers are certainly not clean or particularly safe by any stretch of the imagination. Even the most often used paths and entrances will cause workers to hold their noses and steel their stomachs with thoughts of their loved ones dependence on them to get through their daily toils. Yet even in this realm of fetid wastes and refuse there remain nooks and crannies that collect the worst of it all. Old abandoned passages and half dug expansion projects choke with the worst of the malodorous, putrid contents that the sewers were made to house and hopefully flush out. Indeed, even in the lowest of places, grime tends to distribute itself away from thoroughfares.
A ways from the branching tunnels and layers that make up the core of Immasi’s zone of influence is a cleft in the wall, revealing a opening that shows the abandoned beginnings of yet another service tunnel. A horrible smell escapes from the crack, one that could leave even the most hardened of sewer dweller reeling with their eyes a-water. Squeezing past the damaged edifice ‘rewards’ you with the source of the horrible smell. The walls, dirt and unfinished, match the roof some 9 feet up. A few feet below the ceiling: a pipe perhaps tall enough to crawl through overflowing with the worst looking and smelling sludge in all the realms, the vile contents spilling out creating a mephetic delta caking the floor at least 3 feet deep.
The opening does its job exceptionally well, as even the most maleficent malcontents would not loiter in the area for long. This, of course, is excellent for the City Government as if anyone did spend too long in the area they might be able to spot the cleverly disguised illusion making the size of the pipe almost half as large as it truly was.
Other
This space was created as a safehouse by the ranch for some of their smuggling operations. It was revealed to Rosenbaum Lent and Venka Arton by the ranch and they were the ones to suggest using it after Jonathan Clorvus’s untimely demise.

Conflicts/Quests
The Dens location is known to the ranch and as such, could be compromised by them if needed.

Locations

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/The-Hu.title: The Hundred Hills
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/The-Hu.content:
The mountain range at the southern part of the Ramsted area.

Lore
Description
This range, while low in overall height, are prominent as the only major source of elevation change in the area. The Hundred Hills are an important part of the Ramsted economy, as the city depends on the various metals the Hundred Hills Mine produces for several day-to -day products as well as things to trade with. It is also the sole way several factions and organizations in the city create or upkeep their weapons.
Other
The Hundred Hills were formed over the remains of an Ancient Tarrasque, the mythical monster known as The Wrath. the land in particular is important as the scar in the earth that The Wrath finally settled down to rest in forever was once an area blessed by  a dao. this, combined with the settlement of the the Azers and the creation of the Azer Holy Forge, enabled the mine in the hundred hills to produce multiple different types of metals.

Conflicts/Quests
The mine in the The Hundred Hills has stopped sending its shipments of metal into the city. this has caused considerable problems, as control over the flow of metals from the Hundred Hills Mineis a major point of contention in the city.


The Grand Church of Science seeks to investigate the cause of the suspended metal shipments. while they are not defenseless without the metals due to shipments from other locations of The Grand Church of Science, however they are interested in keeping the resources out of the other factions hands.


The Wyrdkin are interested in getting the flow of metals going again, as they require the metal in order to arm their forces for Immasi’s uprising. Immasi is also suspicious of the fact that his teams have not been able to successfully intercept Grand Church of Science weapon shipments. Still, they know of some rumors regarding the The Hundred Hills, and furnish the party with maps and rumors about shaking earth and hooded figures.


The current blacksmith in Ramsted  wants to know why the flow of metals has stopped, and is desperate to get it going again due to his livelihood being at stake. He promises the services of his master, the master blacksmith Bram Ironskin, as payment to solve the issue.


The village surrounding the entrance to the Hundred Hills Mine seems to be under a strange spell. There are Hill Trolls wandering around the village, seemingly doing tasks, yet no one acknowledges them. When asked about it, the villagers act as though they forget what was said to them.



Locations

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/The-Or.filePath: Ercima Centira/Setax/Ramsted Area/The Orme House of Healing.md
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/The-Or.title: The Orme House of Healing
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/The-Or.content:
organization
A hospital of modest regional importance, it is renown for its effective medicines and top quality care. However, under the guise of good natured healing and social servitude hides a more sinister reality

Lore
Description
A fortified compound located a few miles off The Ramsted Coast. The complex is well maintained and the tasteful decorations and landscaping (such as a waist high hedge maze out front) speak to the higher-brow clientele that makes up the most of the house’s patients. Inside the boundary walls (which are of modest height but would be no slouch in the event of a required defense) is the most striking part of the hospital :  the main dome with four proud towers rising up behind and beside it in a row. The particular angle of the gates of the entrance framed by the main building of the house and all 4 towers behind it is quite impressive to behold. The house docks are strategically placed to ensure coming patients or visitors see this sight when they arrive.
Other
The Orme House of Healing was created by an unknown person a number of years ago. it is in a unique position as it operates out of the jurisdictions of any government due to its highly defensible position of being on an island off the coast of Ramsted. It attracts all sorts of wealthy noble clients due to its reputation for solid work and not so modest price. however, the locals or poorer people within its area of service also think highly of it, as they maintain some spots dutifully reserved for the sole purpose of aiding those who have nothing and no one.
The leadership of the house is noted in House of Healing Hierarchy.
Conflict/Quests
Outwardly, it seems that the House’s goals are in line with what one would expect of a hospital: doing research and patient care. However, the goals of those who lead the house are mostly not so benign.
The General Doctor wants to heal people and was attracted to the role in hopes of serving a historically underserved region.
The Doctor of Finance and Fundraising is corrupt and embezzling money. he is very suspicious of anyone related to monetary institutions. He has had dealings with The Izubar Counting House and is extremely wary of any auditing they might do. He intends to slowly increase prices and reduce positions for the poor to maximize money

Together with the doctor of research, they are working with the Conclave of Lliira to create and test Bottled Joy at the hospital (joy lab link here)

The Doctor of Disease and Viruses is a necromancer

The doctor of disease has been working with the Grand Church of Science and was responsible for helping them enhance the Inoculation Ritual

The Doctor of Research and Experimental Medicine has a vendetta against the Wyrdkin. He wants to use them to create new medicines and things as well as to create the horrific Amalgamations to serve as enhanced soldiers.

Together with the doctor of disease, they work to find ways to synthesize wyrdkin materials into powerful magical elixirs.


Upper Hospital
The visible parts of the house of healing, built on top of the island
Main Waiting Area
the main area of the hospital when one enters. The desk is piloted by Sarjiv. allows access to the Financial Wing as well as the General Wing. Also holds a secret entrance to the Lower Hospital.
Financial Wing
the first door to the right when entering the House. It holds the entrance to the Doctor of Finance and Fundraising’s office and Barjiv’s desk. It also has a store room of ledgers in the tower, some of which will show that the budgets are not balancing truthfully, indicating embezzlement.
General Wing
The first door to the left when entering the House. The area is always much busier than any of the other wing sin the hospital as it is where all the people go. Constant motion and exasperated nurses are helped out to some degree by Carjiv. It has the doctors office at the top of its tower, which also holds a room holding ledgers of all patients the hospital has seen. there are notably many entries that say ‘taken for research’ and redacted.
Disease Wing
The entrance requires one to make their way through the General Wing. Manning the desk for this wing is Narjiv. This wing also houses the Morgue at its far end. Similar to the other wings, it has a tower at its center point which houses the Doctor’s office. This office is guarded at all times by a nurse that stands near the entrance to the tower. The ledger room in this tower contains lists of autopsy reports as well as certain parts for some entries highlighted
Research Wing
while there is a tower for the research wing and a part of the building that can be seen from the outside, this wing is never seen by any who are not explicitly involved with the House. The office at the top of the tower is real, however the only way to enter this tower is with a master keycard which is the combination of two doctor keycards. This will allow the user to access the hidden entrance to the Lower Hospital, and through it the true research wing.
Lower Hospital
The sinister underbelly of the hospital, hidden from view.

Amalgamation Holding Area
Research Ingredient Storage Area

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Ramsted-Area/The-Ra.content:
The area of Ramsted demarcated from the ocean up to the natural barrier made by The Twin Wood

Lore
Description

deeper explanation of what this place is

Other

any lore or additional information that isn’t description


Conflicts/Quests
As of recent, the fishing and general livelihood of the people in the smaller fishing villages on the coast has been put to ruin due to a string of ferocious Sahaugin attacks. This was caused as a result of mind control of fellow sahaugins at the hands of The Astral Kraken, which was attempting to exercise its abilities to raise an army so that it might set up a lair in the nearby area containing the Sahaugin Cavern.

Locations
The Ramsted Coast’s economy and livelihood are mostly dependent on fishing and trading with vessels that come to it in search of a hospital or reasonable renown, The Orme House of Healing.
The Ramsted Coast contains a collection of minor settlements and one larger village, stelvongal.

Ercima-Centira/Setax/Setax.title: Setax
Ercima-Centira/Setax/Setax.content:
Setax is a continent in the world of Ercima Centira. While there is only 1 land mass, different areas on the mass are referred to as continents.
It is an anagram of Texas and contains references to this fact
The main areas of Setax are in the east, with western Setax being much more barren and being seen as rural or a backwater.
The Capital of Setax is Alsadl, a large urban area with breathtaking mountains and varied elevation
The settlement of most note in Western Setax is the city of Ramsted.

Ercima-Centira/Tower-of-Kuyob.title: Tower of Kuyob
Ercima-Centira/Tower-of-Kuyob.content:
A mystical tower which is the home and laboratory of The Grand Wizard Kuyob.
The tower has a magical hedge maze in front of it, and the interior opens into Kuyob’s Menagerie, where he stores the many different creatures he has found over time, as well as different magical artifacts and rooms.

Ercima-Centira/Tribulations.title: Tribulations
Ercima-Centira/Tribulations.content:
A contest and series of challenges, both mental and physical, done by all Acolytes of the Grand Church of Science after their first week at the Grand Church of Science.
The grueling tests determine each individuals worth and how they would be best suited to serving science, and confer the ranks of Searcher, Seeker, and Converter.
The true goal of the tribulations is to determine who would be best fit to be a Scalpel.

Ercima-Centira/Undocumented-Poisonous-Mi.title: Undocumented Poisonous Mire Area
Ercima-Centira/Undocumented-Poisonous-Mi.content:
A marshy, swampy land to the north of Ramsted. Largely ignored by the city as it has historically been deemed a noxious backwater with little to offer…but is that truly the case?

Lore
Description
The land becomes softer and wetter are you approach the poisonous mire. The sparse grassland stops, and a mass of underbrush and thickets of unfriendly thorny bushes and snarls of once living plant matter line the area as far as the eye can see. the damp dank ground seems to have forgotten what a road is supposed to look like.
Other

Conflicts/Quests

Locations

Ercima-Centira/Wyrdkin.title: Wyrdkin
Ercima-Centira/Wyrdkin.content:
The proud name of a proud class of peoples in Setax. Often times discriminated against due to their unique abilities to transform into animals, the Wyrdkin also get a bad rap due to fanciful stories of unsavory things that go bump in the night such as Werewolves and Vampires.

Lore
Description
A race of beings infused with the magic of The Essence. they can shapeshift and have three forms, a ‘humanoid’ form where they will look like any of the traditional DnD races, an animal form where they look like whatever animal they can shift into, and a hybrid form which is an intermediate point between the other two forms. Some wyrdkin will naturally present in a hybrid form and have to train a great deal to be able to transition to either other forms. Classic DnD races that are Wyrdkins include Ratfolk, Tabaxi, Arakokra, etc. if it looks like an animorph reject you know where it goes.
Other
Instrumental in the building of Ramsted an untold number of years ago, the Wyrdkin have long resented being treated as second class citizens. These tensions came to a head a few years ago, resulting in the Wyrdkin being ostracized from Ramsted almost completely, having to seek refuge underneath the very city whose walls their ancestors helped raise.

Conflicts/Quests
Dissenters
There are some wyrdkin that are against Immasi’s plans, either because they think him too violent and extreme or because they like their drugs too much and are scared of change or so. This sows discord amongst the wordings and will make it harder to win the uprising unless things change.

Locations
Ramsted Sewers
Basogre’s Lair
The Orme House of Healing Dungeons & Lab

Halloween-Oneshot.title: Halloween Oneshot
Halloween-Oneshot.content:
the party lay their heads down to rest, not knowing that the area they have chosen as their campsite was once steeped in magic as a repository and factory of mind goblin oil. That was a long time in the past but ever since, when the conditions are just right and the Grand Wizard is set about his various magics and schemes, the fumes of power long past waft up and enrapture any unsuspecting adventurers minds to create intriguing and captivating scenarios and situations…

Intro Song
The Mind Goblin Mash”
(To the tune of “The Monster Mash”)
They were adventurin’ late one night,
When their eyes beheld a sleepy sight,
For their campfire flickered and the moonlight flashed,
And soon their minds began to crash—
(chorus)
They did the Mash! (They did the Mind Goblin Mash!)
The Mind Goblin Mash! (It was a mental clash!)
They did the Mash! (They thought they’d rest at last!)
They did the Mash! (But now they’re spellbound fast!)
They found a field, so calm and still,
Not knowing ‘twas steeped in enchanted spill,
Long, long ago in a wizard’s plot,
Where goblin oil was brewed red-hot—
They did the Mash! (They did the Mind Goblin Mash!)
The Mind Goblin Mash! (A most delirious flash!)
They did the Mash! (Old fumes began to splash!)
They did the Mash! (And warped their minds in a flash!)
The Grand Wizard  Kuyob works in his tower tonight,
His scheming spells set the air alight,
And deep in the ground, where the oil once flowed,
The magic fumes rise where the campers doze—
They did the Mash! (They did the Mind Goblin Mash!)
The Mind Goblin Mash! (A phantasmal bash!)
They did the Mash! (Enraptured by the past!)
They did the Mash! (Now their dreams won’t last!)
So when you rest where strange lights gleam,
Beware old oil and the goblins’ dream,
For if the wizard’s power stirs again,
You’ll wake inside a mind-born den!
(final chorus)
They did the Mash! (The Mind Goblin Mash!)
The Mind Goblin Mash! (You’ll be caught in its flash!)
They did the Mash! (It’s a magical trap!)
They did the Mash! (Now the madness is back!)
The Mind Goblin Mash… it’s a blast!

Heart-of-the-Forest.title: Heart of the Forest
Heart-of-the-Forest.content:
The Progenitor and Spirit of The Twin Wood/Wilderness in and around the Ramsted area.

Lore
Description
A giant 20ft tall, translucent silvery-green Elk. Followed around by a herd of similarly ghostly Cervidae of a more normal size.
Characterization
Incredibly aloof, the Heart does not particularly care much for the activities of the mortals. However, it will be quite irritated with the state of the necromancer stuff that is being introduced within the wilderness
Other
The Heart of the Forest is the deity to which all forest animals are beholden to, and several groups such as the Cloven Council are  sworn to ensure the protection of.
The Heart of the Forest, similar to The Wrath is an entity with a large concentration of The Essence.

Goals
The goals of the Heart of the Forest are unknown to mortals. Legends say that it wishes to ensure the freedom for all wild things to live out their lives.

Conflicts/Quests

list of plot hooks or quests that this person is involved in


Items

list of items the person has, particularly any magic items or quest relevant ones

Home.title: Home
Home.content:
Welcome to the wonderful well-crafted whimsical wisdom-sharing wiki for the Grand and 100% completely fleshed-out world that the DnD campaign takes place in!
Due to the power of the greatest note taking application obsidian, everything is actually pretty organized. you can look through the folders to your right and find basically everything you need sectioned away in folders that start off pretty wide in scope and progressively get more detailed.
That said, this page will list out entry points to various stuff.

Where are we ?
An excellent question that none of you have asked because none of you care, woe is me…

Ercima Centira is the name of the planet/world the story takes place in.
Within the world, you are in the continent of Setax
Within the continent, you are in the western part of Setax
Within the western part of Setax you are in the Ramsted area.

Check out the Ramsted page, its the largest of the nodes and includes maps and a list of influencing parties, etc.

Who are we ?
Look at my party man, Im gonna go to jail skull emoji praying hands emoji dead rose emoji
Transclude of The-Party
Look, I have not had the time to go through and fill out every single persons character sheet ok my fuckin bad, bad dm,, etc etc whatever. I really only use this to keep track of what magic items of consequence you guys actually have…which it is also currently not doing exhaustively or even super up to date. Im busy writing lore ok I trust you guys can fill out the gaps in your entries and send it to me if you want it to look nice.

What are we doing ?
I would hope you would have an answer to that, I can only railroad you guys so much smh

you can check out what you HAVE done in Campaign Timeline. It covers most of the significant events that occur within a day and keeps track of how the story is progressing.

Its in the Session Notes folder, where you’ll find a much more detailed description of what went on in a particular session. I keep the sessions separate from the main body of notes with no linkages because it looks prettier on the graph lol. everything SHOULD be searchable through the text entry thing in the top left though. You can look through the session notes to find out what you should be doing or go check out the ‘Conflicts/Quests’ section for any NPC. I could make a quest board again like I did that one time if you guys think you need it though.

Anything Else ?
Thats basically it tbh, you can go scroll through the characters list or the locations and things for anything specific.
They just released this new feature called databases and it makes grouping things really nice but its not supported with publish just yet so if you see any awkward gaps in a files where it says “characters” and then nothing after it, thats why.
Check out Item List, its pretty cool. as mentioned above, it looks a lot cooler to me because i can see the base view but still has nice enough info for you guys. Most just has weapons btw.
If you come across something and the link tells you the file doesnt exist, you are most likely poking around spoiler territory and I havent published that file.
Some files will be basically empty, just the template and maybe the top level description as to what it is. Without fail, i have absolutely everything already written/known about that character/thing. As you’ll quickly come to see, it is very easy getting lost between connections here and ill get distracted writing something about a person because I remembered something about a location and go write more about that. So if there is a subject, object, location, whatever that you want to know more about and there isn’t much or anything written, please tell me and I will get to it for you.

Items/Homebrew/Church/Assault-Cuirass.title: Assault Cuirass
Items/Homebrew/Church/Assault-Cuirass.content:
improvable attuned armor action
Plate armor.
Once per short rest, you can cast shield(no need for spell slot or knowing the spell).
Friendly creatures within 10ft of the wearer gain +2 AC.
Friendly creatures within 5ft of the wearer gain an extra bonus action. Once per long rest as an action you can consume all bonus actions from yourself and everyone within 10ft of yourself to give everyone within 10ft an extra action.

Found in the depths of the nether reaches, an armor to empower an army

Items/Homebrew/Church/Crystalys.content:
improvable attuned weapon action
+2 Greatsword. Every 5 hits, gain a charge that can be expended for double damage, up to 3 times. If you crit while you have a charge, automatically spend all charges and roll damage dice = number of charges x2

The rage of fights long past crystallize anew

Items/Homebrew/Church/Ethereal-Blade.title: Ethereal Blade
Items/Homebrew/Church/Ethereal-Blade.content:
improvable attuned weapon action bonus_action
+2 longsword.
Once per short rest as a bonus action, make hits with the sword give 2d6 temp hp to the wielder.
Glassify
As an action, target a creature. It has to make a dc 15 constitution saving throw. If it fails, it takes your intelligence stat as damage, its move speed is halved, and it is rendered ethereal meaning it takes no physical damage but all magic damage involving them is doubled (both incoming and outgoing). The target also cannot make direct physical attacks. This effect lasts for 3 turns, with an attempt to save to end the effect early each turn.
On a save, the target takes half damage and is slowed for a turn.
Friendly targets can choose to fail the save and will take no damage (but will still be slowed)

The best offense is destroying your defense

Items/Homebrew/Church/Shadowspain.title: Shadowspain
Items/Homebrew/Church/Shadowspain.content:
improvable attuned weapon action bonus_action
+5 Dagger. When you kill something, store a charge up to 5 charges. You can use a charge to teleport anywhere in a 60m radius as a bonus action. Once per long rest you can use an action to go invisible. This weapon will return to your hand after it is thrown or if you have been disarmed.

Misery is an old friend

Items/Homebrew/Church/Thunderstruck-Revo.title: Thunderstruck Revolver
Items/Homebrew/Church/Thunderstruck-Revo.content:
improvable attuned weapon action bonus_action
Once per short rest, you can imbue your bullets with power adding an additional 2d6 thunder damage to the target and creatures within 10ft of it. The added damage ignores resistances.
Can be reloaded with a bonus action.
Wielder gains resistance to thunder and lightning damage.
Once per short rest, if the revolver has hit atleast 3 different enemies, you can use your action to begin concentrating on chained lighting: enemies hit have to make dex saves or they take 4d8 lighting damage and lose an action (not a turn). Effect lasts 5 turns and goes away if concentration breaks

forged in the heart of a storm with the corpse of an elemental

Items/Homebrew/Loot/Amulet-of-the-Wyrd--.title: Amulet of the Wyrd - Tarrasque Infusion
Items/Homebrew/Loot/Amulet-of-the-Wyrd--.content:
improvable attuned artifact bonus_action action
+2 to attack  & damage while raging.
One extra resistance when raging, decided at the start of the rage.
At the start of the rage, gain temporary hit points equal to your constitution modifier plus your barbarian level.
Savage Transformation
The Soul of The Wrath flows through you
Use a bonus action to enter beast form. Lose control of what you attack and aggro the closest creature to you.
+1d6 to all damage, Deal double damage to contructs.
Jump distance is tripled, +30ft of movement.
Advantage on Strength checks, cannot be charmed or mind controlled.
After landing a finishing blow on anything, you will be bloodlusted making hit attacks do maximum damage for 5 turns. Threshold to crit with a bite will be decreased by the number of final blows achieved in the fight.
If you are unable to get a final blow during the fight, The Wrath will reach through time and sate its hunger by using Titanic Maw on anything within range or that it can reach within 1 turn of movement. If it cannot reach anything, then the damage is inflicted on yourself
Titanic Maw
Once per rage you can make a special bite attack rolling a d20 for damage. Criting with this attack will instantly kill any creature smaller than your current size.
Beast Roar
As a bonus action, everything in a 50ft radius must make a wisdom saving throw, DC 8 + const mod + proficiency bonus. On fail, frightened for 3 turns and you have advantage on it.

Items/Quest-Items/Bottled-Joy.title: Bottled Joy
Items/Quest-Items/Bottled-Joy.content:
A mysterious potion being pedaled by the Conclave of Lliira. Highly addictive, a significant portion of the city has come under its influence.

Lore
Description
A mliky-white fluid that seems to sparkle and swirl inside of its container. While it is odorless and tasteless, it has an effect on the mind that is unmistakable and noticeable as soon as a bottle is opened.
Creation Process
Conclave of Lliira make the base or starting or whatever then they ship it to The Orme House of Healing for vital extra ingredients which are probably the soul bits of wyrdkins when they got seperated from their bodies to make the Amalgamations.
Addiction Process
Consuming the potion will trigger a DC15 wisdom save.
The effects of the potion can be removed with an application of greater restoration
Upon saving, you shrug off the effects of the potion and are simply tipsy and confused for 3 turns, giving disadvantage on wisdom checks.
Upon first failure, character now has a minor addiction. they will have to make a wisdom save at the start of every day to see if the addiction worsens or not. if they pass the wisdom save, they will incur no negative effects for the day.
Upon the second failure, the addiction will progress. the DC to save each day will increase to 20, and failure to save will inflict disadvantage to wisdom checks for the day as well as add to the addiction counter. failing 3 checks in the second phase will progress the addiction to phase 3.
The final stage of the addiction, stage 3, will result in player needing to do a DC 25 wisdom save each day. if they succeed, they have disadvantage to wisdom checks for the day and take 1d12 poison damage. if they fail, their wisdom, strength and constitution is reduced by 5 for the day until they take more potion. upon taking the potion, they take 1d12 damage and heal 1d4. they have disadvantage on wisdom and constitution saves.

Items/Quest-Items/D-Piddy's-Contract.title: D Piddy's Contract
Items/Quest-Items/D-Piddy's-Contract.content:
The Binding Agreement of Presence and Presentation
By Authority of : D. Piddy, Licensed Operator of Effery Jepstein Enterprises - Ramsted Branch
Let it be known that the following parties (hereafter referred to as The Associates) do hereby enter into contract with D. Piddy, K.Relly and Spevin Kacey (hereafter referred to as The Proprietors) under the following terms, conditions, and enchantments:

Clause I – Primary Obligation
The Associates shall, during designated hours of commerce, remain within the personal office of The Proprietors, assuming positions of looming presence and striking menace, hereafter referred to as the Presentation. The Associates are to nod, grunt, or otherwise provide visible assent to the statements and propositions of The Proprietors, thereby reinforcing their perceived authority and reputation.

Clause II – Prohibition of Harm
The Associates shall not, by hand, spell, weapon, or willful intent, directly cause harm to The Proprietors. For the avoidance of doubt, this clause covers physical, magical, and overtly hostile actions.

Clause III – Conduct of Silence
The Associates shall remain silent during The Presentation, speaking no words that would contradict, undercut, or embarrass The Proprietors before clients or rivals. Thereafter the associates shall be allowed to speak but not speak any words that would contradict, undercut or embarrass the proprietors before clients and rivals

Clause IV – Duration of Service
This Agreement shall remain binding until such time as The Proprietors declares their objectives of influence “satisfactorily reinforced,” or until such time as The Proprietors no longer conduct business in their current office.

Items/Quest-Items/Kuyobian-Keys.title: Kuyobian Keys
Items/Quest-Items/Kuyobian-Keys.content:
mystical artifacts both magical and mechanical in nature that can be used to open vaults and caches of items left behind in the world by The Grand Wizard Kuyob

Lore
Description
A strange contraption made of glass and copper, it look like a gilded pyramid with various gears and shifting pistons within it. when brought near something sealed by Kuyob, the mechanisms within it will begin to pulse and the pyramid will open up, melding with the lock and evaporating both.
Other
Locations
Keys have been found in the following locations so far:
deep within the Hundred Hills Mine
in the belongings of Myron & Byron
in the office of D Piddy

Items/Quest-Items/Patron’s-Shards.title: Patron’s Shards
Items/Quest-Items/Patron’s-Shards.content:
bits of metal imbued with strong magic, scattered around the Ramsted area. They seem as though they might be pieces of a bladed weapon.

First Shard
The first shard will unlock the Patron’s Touch cantrip.  this will enable the user to force a DC 10 wisdom save on a creature after hitting it with a melee attack. on a fail, nothing will happen. on a success, deal additional 1d6 necrotic damage and heal half of the damage dealt
Second Shard
Obtaining a second shard will upgrade the cantrip. the wisdom save will increase to a DC 13. If the creature is damaged/below 50 HP and rolls a nat 1 for the wisdom save, it will instantly die.
Third Shard
Getting a third shard will upgrade the cantrip further. the wisdom save will increase to a DC 15. If a creature rolls a nat 1 on the save and instantly dies, it will be re-animated in the servitude of its killer for 10 turns.
After obtaining the third shard, the Mysterious Patron will make contact with the one that serves it in a time of great stress and offer help in exchange for something. The boon received will be equivalent to what is sacrificed. the options for sacrifice are -2 to a stat, a spell (reward improves depending on level), or magic items.
Fourth Shard
The Fourth shard will improve the save DC to be 16. Three times per long rest, the caster can force a failure of the wisdom saving throw (this will not trigger the instant death, it will simply get you extra damage and a heal)
Fifth Shard
The Fifth shard will improve the cantrip by improving the duration of a turned ally to be 1 day (after something gets a nat 1 save, it will last for a day as opposed to 10 turns).

The only truth is power, and I am the most truthful being you will ever meet

A list of known shard owners, past and present:

Items/Quest-Items/Ring-of-Invisibility.title: Ring of Invisibility
Items/Quest-Items/Ring-of-Invisibility.content:
attuned artifact action
A simple band of polished silver given to the scalpel candidates by Nightshade Shadowsbane. The ring seems to have a faint internal glow to it

Use an action and go invisible.
Attacking breaks the invisibility.
Curse
using the ring triggers an increasingly difficult DC wisdom saving throw. On failure, an unknown powerful entity seems to gain increasing control over the users body…

Items/Quest-Items/Staff-of-Summon-Ogres.title: Staff of Summon Ogres
Items/Quest-Items/Staff-of-Summon-Ogres.content:
action artifact consumable

Oneshot-Basogre.title: Oneshot Basogre
Oneshot-Basogre.content:
Special Basogre Boss Statblock
Large giant, chaotic evil
Armor Class 15 (natural armor)
Hit Points 195 (17d10 + 102)
Speed 40 ft.

Ability Scores





















STRDEXCONINTWISCHA22 (+6)10 (+0)22 (+6)8 (-1)10 (+0)12 (+1)

Saving Throws
Str +10, Con +10, Wis +4
Skills
Intimidation +5, Perception +4
Damage Resistances
Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from nonmagical attacks
Condition Immunities
Charmed, Frightened
Senses
Darkvision 60 ft., Passive Perception 14
Languages Common, Giant
Proficiency Bonus +4
Challenge Rating 10 (5,900 XP)

Features
Legendary Resistance (3/day). If Basogre fails a saving throw, he can choose to succeed instead.
Gluttonous Fortitude. When Basogre would take damage that would reduce him below 50 hit points for the first time, he instead is reduced to 50 hit points and can’t be reduced below 50 hit points until the start of his next turn. He then devours a burger from his bag as a free action, letting out a satisfied belch.
Malding Rage (3/day), but only available after getting below 50% hp. As a bonus action, Basogre enters a frenzy for 1 minute. While raging:

He gains advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws
He deals an extra 1d8 damage with melee weapon attacks
He has resistance to all damage except psychic damage
He can’t cast spells or concentrate on spells
His rage ends early if he is knocked unconscious or if his turn ends and he hasn’t attacked a hostile creature or taken damage since his last turn

Meat Shield. When Basogre is hit by an attack and has a minion within 5 feet of him, he can use his reaction to force the minion to take the hit instead. The minion takes the full damage of the attack.
Insatiable Hunger. Basogre has advantage on attack rolls against creatures that are frightened or prone.
Summon Saminion (Recharge 5-6). As a bonus action, Basogre summons 1d4 + 1 Saminion in unoccupied spaces within 20 feet of him. These saminions act on his initiative count and follow his commands. Saminions disappear after 10 minutes or when reduced to 0 hit points.

Actions
Multiattack. Basogre makes two attacks: one with his greatclub and one with his bite, or he uses Bag of Burgers twice.
Greatclub. Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target.
Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target.
Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage. Basogre regains hit points equal to half the damage dealt.
Bag of Burgers (Recharge 4-6). Basogre reaches into his greasy bag and hurls a burger at a point he can see within 60 feet. Choose one of the following effects:

Rancid Burger: The burger explodes in a 10-foot radius. Each enemy creature in the area must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 3d10 poison damage and becoming poisoned for 1 minute on a failed save, or half damage and no poison on a success. Poisoned creatures can repeat the save at the end of each of their turns.
Empowering Burger: The burger lands in a 10-foot radius. Each minion in the area catches and devours a piece, gaining 20 temporary hit points and advantage on attack rolls until the end of Basogre’s next turn.
Explosive Burger: The burger detonates on impact. Each creature in a 15-foot radius must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d8 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. The area becomes lightly obscured by grease smoke until the start of Basogre’s next turn.

Crushing Charge (Recharge 5-6). Basogre moves up to his speed in a straight line and can move through the space of Medium or smaller creatures. Each creature whose space he moves through must make a DC 18 Strength saving throw, taking 4d10 bludgeoning damage and being knocked prone on a failed save, or half damage on a success.

Bonus Actions
Summon Saminions (Recharge 5-6). Summon 1d4 + 1 Saminions.
Aggro For Mae! Basogre roars a command. All of his minions within 60 feet that can hear him can immediately use their reaction to move up to their speed toward an enemy of Basogre’s choice or make one weapon attack.
Im Malding!! Basogre flies into a rage.
Devour Minion. Basogre grabs and devours one of his minions within 5 feet (no save). The minion is instantly killed and Basogre regains 3d8 + 10 hit points.

Reactions
Meat Shield. Force a minion within 5 feet to take a hit meant for Basogre.
Burger Toss. When Basogre takes damage from a ranged attack, he can use his reaction to throw a Rancid Burger at the attacker (if Bag of Burgers is available).

Legendary Actions (3/round)
Basogre can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature’s turn. Basogre regains spent legendary actions at the start of his turn.
Move. Basogre moves up to half his speed without provoking opportunity attacks. Any minions within 10 feet can also move up to half their speed.
Club Smash. Basogre makes one greatclub attack.
Feeding Frenzy (Costs 2 Actions). Basogre uses Bag of Burgers (if available) to throw an Empowering Burger at his minions, or makes a bite attack.
Rally the Horde (Costs 3 Actions). Basogre lets out a terrifying roar and summons 1d3 Saminions in unoccupied spaces within 20 feet of him (regardless of whether Summon saminion is recharged).

Saminion
Small humanoid (goblinoid), neutral evil. small bald goblins with exceptionally large noses
AC 13 (leather scraps), HP 15 (3d6 + 3), Speed 30 ft.





















STRDEXCONINTWISCHA10 (+0)14 (+2)12 (+1)8 (-1)8 (-1)6 (-2)
Skills: Stealth +6
Senses: Darkvision 60 ft., Passive Perception 9
Languages: Common, Goblin
Nimble Escape. The minion can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.
Pack Tactics. The minion has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the minion’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.
Actions:
Rusty Blade. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.
Thrown Rock. Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

Oneshot-Kinra.title: Oneshot Kinra
Oneshot-Kinra.content:
Medium humanoid (hobgoblin), neutral
Armor Class 16 (barkskin)
Hit Points 82 (10d8 + 40)
Speed 30 ft.

Ability Scores





















STRDEXCONINTWISCHA10 (+0)14 (+2)18 (+4)14 (+2)20 (+5)12 (+1)

Saving Throws
Int +6, Wis +9
Skills
Animal Handling +9, Insight +9, Medicine +9, Nature +10, Perception +9, Survival +9
Damage Resistances
Poison
Condition Immunities
Diseased, Poisoned
Senses
Darkvision 60 ft., Passive Perception 19
Languages Common, Druidic, Elvish, Sylvan
Proficiency Bonus +4

Features
Spellcasting. Kin’ra is a 10th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). he has the following druid spells prepared:
Cantrips (at will): Druidcraft, Guidance, Poison Spray, Shillelagh
1st level (4 slots): Absorb Elements, Cure Wounds, Entangle, Goodberry
2nd level (3 slots): Heat Metal, Lesser Restoration, Pass Without Trace, Spike Growth
3rd level (3 slots): Call Lightning, Conjure Animals, Dispel Magic, Plant Growth
4th level (3 slots): Blight, Grasping Vine, Polymorph, Stone Shape
5th level (2 slots): Contagion, Greater Restoration, Insect Plague, Scrying
Wild Shape (2/short rest). Kin’ra can use his action to magically assume the shape of a beast with a CR of 1 or lower for up to 5 hours. he can revert to her normal form as a bonus action.
Circle of Decomposition. Kin’ra has mastered a controversial branch of druidic magic focused on decay, waste, and the natural cycle of decomposition. he gains the following abilities:
Natural Recycler. Kin’ra is immune to disease and poison. he can consume spoiled or rotten food without ill effect and can cast Purify Food and Drink at will without expending a spell slot.
Fecal Familiar. Kin’ra is accompanied by a Dung Beetle Swarm (use Swarm of Insects stats, but it has 45 HP and immunity to poison damage/condition). The swarm follows his commands and acts on his initiative. If destroyed, he can summon a new one after a long rest.
Compost Heap. When Kin’ra casts a spell that deals poison damage or creates difficult terrain, he can choose to make that area produce a noxious stench. Creatures that start their turn in the area or enter it for the first time must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of their next turn.

Actions
Multiattack. Kin’ra makes two attacks with his Staff of the Dunghill or uses Fecal Bolt twice.
Staff of the Dunghill. Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit (with Shillelagh), reach 5 ft., one target.
Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage.
Fecal Bolt. Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 60 ft., one target.
Hit: 13 (3d8) poison damage. If the target fails a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, it is also blinded until the end of its next turn as waste matter splashes in its eyes.
Summon Waste Elemental (1/day). Kin’ra summons a Filth Elemental in an unoccupied space within 30 feet. The elemental is friendly to Kin’ra and her allies, obeys her commands, and acts on her initiative. It remains for 1 hour, until reduced to 0 hit points, or until Kin’ra dismisses it as a bonus action.
Circle of Fertilization (Recharge 5-6). Kin’ra targets a point she can see within 90 feet. A 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point fills with brown-green mist. The area is heavily obscured and counts as difficult terrain. Each creature that starts its turn in the mist must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 3d8 poison damage and becoming poisoned for 1 minute on a failed save, or half damage and no poison on a success. Poisoned creatures can repeat the save at the end of each of their turns. The mist lasts for 1 minute or until dispersed by strong wind.

Bonus Actions
Wild Shape (2/short rest). Transform into a beast (CR 1 or lower).
Septic Command. Kin’ra commands his Dung Beetle Swarm or Filth Elemental to take an action.
Fungal Growth. Kin’ra causes mushrooms to rapidly sprout in a 10-foot square within 60 feet. The area becomes difficult terrain. Any creature that enters the area for the first time or starts its turn there takes 2d6 poison damage.

Reactions
Absorb Elements (1st-level spell). When Kin’ra takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, he can use his reaction to reduce the damage and store some of the energy for his next melee attack.
Excremental Shield. When Kin’ra is hit by a melee attack, he can use her reaction to coat the attacker with waste matter. The attacker must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned until the end of their next turn.

Filth Elemental
Large elemental, neutral
AC 14, HP 90 (12d10 + 24), Speed 30 ft., burrow 20 ft.





















STRDEXCONINTWISCHA18 (+4)10 (+0)15 (+2)6 (-2)10 (+0)7 (-2)
Damage Resistances: Acid, Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from nonmagical attacks
Damage Immunities: Poison
Condition Immunities: Exhaustion, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Unconscious
Senses: Darkvision 60 ft., Tremorsense 30 ft., Passive Perception 10
Languages: Terran (understands but doesn’t speak)
Noxious Presence. Creatures that start their turn within 5 feet of the elemental must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of their next turn.
Siege Monster. The elemental deals double damage to objects and structures.
Actions:
Multiattack. The elemental makes two slam attacks.
Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.
Engulf (Recharge 5-6). The elemental moves up to its speed. While doing so, it can enter Large or smaller creatures’ spaces. Whenever it enters a creature’s space, the creature must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a success, the creature can move to the nearest unoccupied space. On a failure, the creature takes 10 (3d6) poison damage and is engulfed. An engulfed creature is blinded, restrained, and takes 10 (3d6) poison damage at the start of each of the elemental’s turns. An engulfed creature can escape by using an action to make a DC 15 Strength check. On a success, it escapes to an unoccupied space within 5 feet.

Dung Beetle Swarm
Medium swarm of Tiny beasts, unaligned
AC 12, HP 45 (10d8), Speed 20 ft., burrow 10 ft., climb 20 ft.





















STRDEXCONINTWISCHA3 (-4)13 (+1)10 (+0)1 (-5)7 (-2)1 (-5)
Damage Resistances: Bludgeoning, Piercing, Slashing
Damage Immunities: Poison
Condition Immunities: Charmed, Frightened, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Prone, Restrained, Stunned
Senses: Blindsight 10 ft., Passive Perception 8
Swarm. The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and can move through openings large enough for a Tiny insect. The swarm can’t regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.
Actions:
Bites. Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm’s space. Hit: 10 (4d4) piercing damage, or 5 (2d4) if the swarm has half its hit points or fewer. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute.

Open-Skies-Party.title: Open Skies Party
Open-Skies-Party.content:
One of the two political parties of The Twin Wood

Lore
Description
The open skies party is lead by Stagannis Twistroot, a large stag that extolls the virtues and necessity of the animals of the forest living in harmony and allowing each animal to have a more equitable existence. the Open Skies party has policy platforms of redistributing the hibernation and forest-oh-one-kay’s of some of the larger predator animals as well as animals with larger overall biomass (the neutral squirrel union) to help out those animals that have it harder.
Other
While the Open Skies party is localized to The Twin Wood, the party has several sympathetic parties and feeder entities as well as offshoots around the entore ramsted area, including places beyond the swamp.
their secret phrase would be “We live through the heart “

Conflicts/Quests
Obviously they would like to win the election over the Shaded Leaf Party.

Locations

list of places of interest/ encounter areas in the location. link to notes if the sub location is large/complex enough

Session-Notes/August-16th---The-Showers-.content:
Previous Session                                         Campaign Timeline                                       Next Session

Scenes
Content Covered
18 is entirely too many cowboys

the main event, the showers at ramsted ranch
entering the shower area, will describe the area and that there are 18 young boys in various states of undress, most of them in assless chaps walking around in the bath area doing various things like arranging oils and getting fruit and splashing in the water
will be asked if they would like to do the massage, venka will greedily and freakily agree
will be offered a cowboy hat. wearing the hat will allow for the energies to flow from the boys into user during massage. boys should begin to look visibly weaker and queasy and even perhaps a bit older. should be clear that they are also uncomfortable but pretending they are cool with it. venka should be john groper
will also give benefits of a long rest to players
place is enchanted by some magic, should be hard to tell if its for the users or the ‘employees’
asking the employees questions will be hard they will try to evade answering and just try to provide more services
after a few hours with copious amounts of splashing and grunting and moaning and interesting music playing, party will leave and venka will be noticeably peppier, spring in his step and look energetic while the employees look quite a bit ennervated

Keepers of the Gates of Hell

infernal backdoor network, which will allow demons and things to travel through to this plane.
doors to this place will be sealed with infernal magic.
knews of the lustcubus will have reached the ranch and the ranch leaders are eager to find out who managed to sneak past their ticket system
door puzzle: the door then displays a different set of markings. 3 empty dots at the top, with 9 sigils in a circle with a center. The following is written in infernal underneath the symbols “Hell is order, Order is law, law is deception. choose the path as it descends or be consumed”  following this, the two glowing red wrought iron covers on the door will bulge outward with a glow and melt away in the air, the edges curling inward before disappearing like a paper set to flame. ends with “what is the truest essence of Hell?” depending on who you serve you can only select the sigil of that layer/archdevil. which will then let you into the ‘sauna’.
Sauna Keeper is Jorder Bopper (Horder bopper), bit lazy but will be surprised that people have entered, since there was no crossing scheduled for today. will gripe about how hes getting shit for unauthorized transfers anyways because of the lustcubous business.
Mr Scratch’s employer will want him to disable the backdoor to his layer while allowing them to exist for other layer

The Life and Death of Jorder Bopper

The magical door passed, the room beyond holds 5 infernal backdoors. mr scratch sees these and requests the expertise of n’iergith the profane and discovers what they are
in interrogating jorder, they jump him but he gets a button off to sound an alarm. edon kills him
the party is collected by D Piddy and his two co-owners who see venka, and recognize an opportunity
they summon the party to their office to work out a deal
Piddy wants the crew to sign a contract involving working for him by just standing and nodding in assent to whatever he says

Unused Content
Conversations of a Delicate Nature

Mr D (D Piddy) is conversing with immasi about the nature of the help the ranch provides immasi and what he must do
drop info about how dolor inlifctus has come to the ranch demanding answers and how the ranch is currently not giving up immasi yet they could if he doesnt do some stuff tehy want…
K Relly or Spevin will be conversing with heff about the attacks on their suppky chain and how that could be ‘resolved’ if they give perhaps more money or other stuff. will pretend that they did it on purpose
these events were altered slightly in the gameplay

Oh mother where art thou

jauntief and perhaps a slightly older boy talking about themselves
drop in the fact that these kids have been stollen from places
‘why do we have to play with these wierd old men theyre all so creepy and its so boring why do we have to act like we are having fun ’ ‘if you do a good job then youll be sure to be adopted’ ‘but i dont want to be adopted i want to find my mom again’ ‘sigh, kid look, if your here your mom probably.. well..yknow what im sure mr D will figure something out’

Gameplay

Party joined venka in the showers and found 18 naked cowboys of concerningly young age
Thawaa Edon and Venka go do the rodeo which noticeably causes them to get improved HP and long rest, while the attendants are visibly worsened and aged
Thawaa finds that the oil and cowboy hat have the same arcana symbol on them
the party decides to go to the sauna after, come across a door
making it past the door they find 5 portal to the hells and a guy guarding them
after some questions, the guard (Jorder Bopper) hits a button as he is suspicious of mr scratch’s lines of questioning, leading the party to kill him but not before he gets the button pressed. the doors shut and the portals are closed off
the party is collected from the room a few hours later by D Piddy and crew
D Piddy talks with the party about a partnership

Session-Notes/December-8th---Incident-at.content:
Previous Session                                         Campaign Timeline                                       Next Session

Scenes
Intro Speech:
Previously in the campaign, in your great adventure in setax: let me re-set the stage, firm up your memory, regale your mind with the story as it stands…
Your motley crew of misfits and mercenaries became the brothers you now know some two-three long weeks ago, when those fateful letters from the illustrious delmar danth made your paths to cross.
Your mutual ally’s death, quite the tragic event, nevertheless tied you all together to discover what strange magics or sinister plots were afoot in the city and its surrounding areas. The party went low into the earth and high into the mountains, out to the ocean and in to locked doors and hidden dens. You made some allies and yet more enemies.
We return now, to the latest episode of mishaps and mayhem you find yourself invariably embroiled in: After leaving a city on the razors edge of conflict, tensions long since brewing set to to bubble up into tumultuous upheaval sure to make a mark on history, you attempt to path things into a semblance of a settled state with a few key meetings and urgent messages. in the hopes of making use if that legendary chariot used to rain destruction upon the hospital of legitimate targets, the party seeks out their fetid yet fecund friend, kinra the fecologist, in hopes of him directing you to some hardy beasts of burden capable of hauling the chariot over to the city. After some keen observances, you found your ally foisted upon a cliff in supreme distress at the hands of those ill tempered, hooked nosed freaks, the goblins of the forest. The party in their fury cleared out the camp of cretins and saved your funky familiar, much to his relief and the animals around him. yet, in the questioning of Kinra and the animals captured by the goblins, the party learned of yet a new layer to the political machinations that abound in ramsted: the Animals of the forest were on the cusp of electing a new viceroy of the heart, and one of the parties was quite interested in massaging the results to be in their favor. and so we return to the most recent events in this epic, with the party having just adjourned a meeting with the noble shaded leaf party in which they had discussed ways in which to remove the troublesome tittering of a certain tenacious tuft-eater known as charlie chirp, in addition to promising a few incidents wherein the shaded leaf would be able to flex their superior forces by quelling any horrible goblin attacks that may or may definitely occur
Content Covered
Pin the false flag on the donkey

party generates a goblin scare and makes it obvious the shaded leaf is the saviors
the shaded leaf are hosting a rally and 11th hour debate right before the election. the election will be held later that night

Check your neck

Charlie Chirp gets his top blown off by the party in order to stop poisonous ideas from spreading further
counting or not counting spell violence

Unused Content
Search for the Owlbear

After the election stuff is done, the shaded leaf party will reveal the location for the alpha owl bear warren. if you cast enlarge on it and another one, you can use this for the chariot. you will have to either beat the owlbear or do something else to establish your power over him/them.  the alpha is like on some andrew tate shit

Gameplay

yobi and scratch stakeout a goblin camp and use brick to send mental images to the goblin in it to make them think that one of the goblins is the chosen goblin and he will lead them to a land with lots of animals to get ton of loot and shit
Thawaa went to find a deer and bribes him with bread and then brainwashes him into killing charlie chirp at a chosen phrase (counting or not counting predator violence)
bill is a backup in case chirp needs to get kirked
morning after, thawaa colludes with victor clawson to get more browniepoints for shaded leaf by setting up a goblin scare which he stops in the name of the shaded leaf
this works but the rabbit that was being saved dies out of shock anyways
Bill sets up a blind at the clearing and gets ready
Yobi and Scratch follow up on the goblins and see where they are
Find that goblins are recruiting more goblins
Thawaa realizes he can tie up loose ends by having the deer kill Charlie chirp and then have bill kill the deer
Thawaa and Edon use thaumaturgy to replace part of the speech chirp is giving, which then triggers the deer sleeper cell and kills chirp
Goblins break out into the clearing at the same time
Birdonius loudly proclaims that the shaded leaf is protecting the people and launches a fireball into the goblins
The chosen goblin gets stabbed by Thawaa and reanimated, making the surrounding goblins think him to be a born again messiah perhaps
The party clears out the goblins and the rest of the animals and goes to meet up with party leadership

It is not good at counting and wants to find some mango chutney as it heard that is good food

Growing pains

Thawaa collects the last shard he can before the uprising
Distinct power thrums through him, granting further insight into his patrons blessing
Beset by a nightmare/vision and given info by his patron as to where his further challenges lay
As Thawaa goes to sleep, it comes in fits and bursts, unable to get comfortable. The wrinkles on his skin burn and itch, stealing any ability to head off into a land of dreams. frustrated, he climbs out of his berth and heads outside to get some fresh air. the door slowly swings open, and he is accosted by a blast of heat. the very air afire, he looks around wildly, stumbling forward in fear and confusion. he spins around and cannot find the door he just left. the fire surrounding everywhere begin to encroach upon him, growing hungrier and latching onto you skin. But as he stares in horror, he realizes the fire gnawing upon his body is not the blistering heat he expected but instead a biting cold. the fire wreathes his body and burns him away, his body turning to ash. he panics, unsure of what will happen to him. and then darkness all around him. and a familiar voice cuts through it all. “Ah my dear lovely servant! how nice for you to join me. a pleasant journey i hope! i see you have been quite busy since last we spoke. i love being proven right! as per our arrangement i shall dispense upon you further boons. my blessing grows stronger and you shall soon be ready for greater tasks. it will be painful! oh it will be very painful and difficult! but make it through and you will be powerful. oh more powerful than your wildest dreams. but there will be roadblocks. indeed there will. infect, I think the time has come for me to reveal the locations of some of the roadblocks. now, you will have to forgive me. i cannot let you know too much more due to certain arrangements beyond your little mortal comprehensions, nothing to worry about. but it should interest you to direct your attention to the north of your current backwater. or you could not, but I would be disappointed having to wait for a new interesting mortal, I’ve grown quite attached to you! but i have taken up too much of your time i fear. go now, and enjoy your new toys.”

Birdonius the Brave and Bold

The party converse with deacon dahc about how best to stop the threat of the ranch
birdonius tells him about what the ranch has been up to and how the conclave may be willing to help out with an attack on the ranch if the party convince them.
Dahc thanks birdonius for his services to science and agrees to wait 4 days before marching on the ranch

Protecting the relics of science

The final 3 relics in the grand church of science are under heavy guard
8 guards at the entrance, 2 guards per shelf, librarian on full alert
any unsanctioned movement towards back of library will call in guards as well.
Dahc came in and used his badge to unveil the relics and grant them to the party for safekeeping and hopefully to help them party in the coming battle and to keep them safe from john lennon

Shaded-Leaf-Party.content:
One of the two political parties of The Twin Wood

Lore
Description
The Shaded Leaf party is all about economic growth and pulling yourself up by your bootstraps. They do not appreciate the notion of equality for equalities sake.
Other

any lore or additional information that isn’t description


Conflicts/Quests
Victor Clawson seems to have indicated to Mr Scratch that there is some degree of predator superiority sentiment in the upper echelons of the Shaded Leaf, although it is yet unclear if this is rife in the party or just a select few, possibly a sub-faction within.
The Shaded Leaf party has officially contracted the party in order to do some ‘creative campaigning’ on behalf of the Shaded Leaf. This includes staging attacks by goblins in key constituencies and politically assassinating outspoken Open Skies Party spokesperson, Charlie Chirp.

Stagannis-Twistroot.title: Stagannis Twistroot
Stagannis-Twistroot.content:
The lead candidate for Viceroy of the Heart of the Open Skies Party

Lore
Description
a large, rather handsome stag with impressive antlers.
Characterization
Stagannis campaigns for the good of all animals, but there is an undercurrent to his speechs and actions that speak to a ‘white mans burden’-esque slant to his world view. Since it is well known that the Heart of the Forest is a stag, or atleast stag-like, Twistroot often echoes sentiment such as ‘while it might be the case that I was made in the image of the heart, it doesnt mean that lesser animals deserve to be trampled! we must have compassion and equality for everyone!!’
Other
“these Shaded leaf people, they talka bout economic growth and stuff. how do you think theyre funding that growth? theyre bringing over things from other places, places outside of the woods! I love Tau’Sin i have so many friends from tausin but these workers that are flooding our borders to provide cheap labor for the money machines the shaded leaf want to keep running, theyre illegal bugs! and theyre not good bugs, no they re not. Its putting good Heart-fearing animals out of work while the shaded leaf fattens up their forest01k even more. its tragic really.”
“may the heart of the forest awaken the animals and help them see the evils of the shaded leaf AND the goblin coalition”

The-Party/Thaw'aa.title: Thaw'aa
The-Party/Thaw'aa.content:
A young paladin who wants to do what is right, yet his decisions muddy the clarity of that instinct more and more. He answered Danth’s summons as he heard about the involvement of necromancy and disease, reminding him of memories about his father, both the bad and the good.

Lore
Description
Characterization
Other
Thawaa finds a mysterious shard in a cave when looking for the body of science. connecting with it, he meets an unknown entity that promises him power beyond his wildest dreams and the ability to achieve everything he could ever want, so long as he gives himself over to it. Thawaa accepts, becoming a servant of Mysterious Patron.
The Patron instructs him to recover more of the Patron’s Shards, imbuing thawaa with increasing slivers of power which grant him a dark ability to suck the life out of those he touches. it improves the more shards he collects.
Face to face with the Doctor of Plagues and Diseases Ivebinr Aisendead, Thawaa faces a reckoning. in his most desperate moment his patron steps in, and ask him for a sacrifice to prove his level of loyalty. Thawaa decides his strength is not enough, and if something is faulty or lacking then it should be thrown away. he renounces his own strength and commits fully to relying on his patron. In doing so, his body becomes a wizened husk of what it was, his skin becoming sallow and loose on his body as his muscles decay. He is left looking skeletal and frail, yet his other sense and abilities blaze with renewed fervor. (+2 to everything other thna strength, strength took a -2 hit)
Thawaa gathering the patron shards will grant him certain powers and revelations
Thawaa get contacted by the mysterious patron again, the patron will explain certain things. upgrade the grasp to do full heal? also has to get the thing to get one undead guy for the day

Viceroy-of-the-Heart.title: Viceroy of the Heart
Viceroy-of-the-Heart.content:
The Elected leader of The Twin Wood and general forests around the Ramsted area

Lore
Description
The previous Viceroy was kidnapped by The Orme House of Healing and was tortured and mutilated for magical parts. He was a wyvern and was the one Mr Scratch’s octo-cam caught sight of for a split second as the party escaped from the hospital.
The new viceroy has yet to be elected.
Characterization
Other
The Viceroy is technically a public servant even though most lord it over the other animals. While their political power is quite significant, it is NOT the only political power of the wilderness, nor is it the single most powerful one. In fact, the position is a carveout made by some enterprising earlier animals that sort of sat on the coattails of the extremely powerful Heart of the Forest and use it to find a place in the conversations regarding the wilderness. other major players in wilderness politics include the Cloven Council as well as the Fae court of Tau’Sin and the Coven of Sufayd Aurat

Goals
The main goal of any Viceroy is to maintain the wellbeing of the animals in the Ramsted area as well as ensuring the Heart of the Forest remains safe and free

Conflicts/Quests
probably some connection to the Fae court and the hags as well. also very occasionally gets actual messages from the Heart
